name: Big Match Special Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Kraft bottled creamy French dressing (the orange NOT the red)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the Miracle Whip salad dressing and 1/3 cup of Relish.
2. Add another 1/3 cup of Kraft bottled creamy French dressing (ensure it's the orange variety).
3. Stir in 1 tbsp of Sugar, 1/4 tsp of Black pepper, and 1 tsp of Dry minced onion until well mixed.
4. Adjust seasoning to taste if desired.
